module.title: Retirement Planning
module.description: Prepare for a secure retirement by setting realistic goals, choosing the right accounts, and building a long-term savings strategy.
learning_objectives: Understand how much retirement income you may need
Use contribution strategy and compounding to grow savings
Plan withdrawal strategy and risk management for retirement
Adjust your plan as your life and income change

lessons.title: Retirement Basics
lessons.content: The earlier you start, the less you typically need to save each month because compounding has more time to work. Planning starts with estimating annual expenses in retirement and inflation-adjusting them.

lessons.title: Retirement Account Options
lessons.content: Common account types include employer-sponsored plans and individual retirement accounts. Tax treatment differs by account type, so your strategy should balance current tax impact and future flexibility.

lessons.title: Savings Rate and Contribution Strategy
lessons.content: Consistent monthly contributions and periodic increases are often more important than trying to time the market. Automating contributions helps maintain discipline through market cycles.

lessons.title: Portfolio Risk Over Time
lessons.content: Portfolio risk should generally decrease as retirement approaches. A diversified mix of assets can reduce the impact of downturns while still supporting long-term growth.

lessons.title: Withdrawal Planning
lessons.content: Retirement planning includes how you will withdraw funds. Sustainable withdrawal rates, tax-efficient sequencing, and contingency planning can help your savings last longer.

questions.question: When is generally the best time to start saving for retirement?
questions.explanation: Starting early gives compounding more time to work.

questions.question: Why does diversification matter in retirement portfolios?
options: It reduces risk from any single asset
questions.explanation: Diversification spreads risk across different asset classes.

questions.question: What is a key goal of withdrawal planning?
questions.explanation: Withdrawal planning aims to sustain income over a potentially long retirement.
